data.title: Life360 reports record operational performance for Q4 2025, with significant key metrics achieved.
data.description: Today, Life360 released a report on their operational performance for Q4 and full year 2025, showcasing record key performance metrics.

data.title: NiSource Inc. (NYSE: NI) declares $0.30/share dividend, payable on Feb 20, 2026, to stockholders of record on Feb 3, 2026.
data.description: The directors of NiSource Inc. (NYSE: NI) have announced a quarterly common stock dividend of $0.30 per share. The payment will be made on February 20, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 3, 2026. NiSource Inc. (NYSE: NI) is a prominent fully-regulated utility firm in the U.S., catering to about 3.3 million natural gas users and 500,000 electric customers spread across six states.

data.title: NOVAGOLD secures $200M in bought deal financing.
data.description: In a recent development, it has been reported that a new record high of 5,000 COVID-19 cases have been confirmed in the past 24 hours. This surge brings the total number of cases in the country to over 150,000. Additionally, the death toll has also risen, with 50 new deaths reported, bringing the total number of fatalities to 2,500. The government has announced stricter measures to control the spread of the virus, including mandatory mask-wearing in public places and a renewed emphasis on social distancing protocols. These latest figures highlight the continued challenges the country faces in combating the pandemic and the importance of adhering to health guidelines to protect the population.

data.title: AVANTA Residential invests $7.0 million in Amare Rio Rancho build-to-rent community, adding 128 units in Rio Rancho, NM.
data.description: In Denver, AVANTA Residential revealed a $7.0 million preferred equity injection towards the development of Amare Rio Rancho, a novel 128-unit build-to-rent residential complex in Rio Rancho, New Mexico. Verdot Capital, a well-established real estate development company with more than 20 years in the industry, is spearheading the project. The investment will support the creation of a diverse range of housing units, including 39 one-bedroom, 39 two-bedroom, and 50 three-bedroom townhomes and detached patio homes.

data.title: Independent Bank Corp. reports Q4 net income of $75.3 million, $1.52 per share, up from $34.3 million in Q3.
data.description: Independent Bank Corp, the parent company of Rockland Trust Company, revealed a net income of $75.3 million in the fourth quarter of 2025, translating to $1.52 per diluted share. This marks a significant increase from the third quarter of 2025 when they reported a net income of $34.3 million, which was $0.69 per diluted share. The fourth quarter results exclude merger-related expenses and a one-time provision for credit losses related to the Company's acquisition of Enterprise Bancorp, Inc during the third quarter.

data.title: Vesta to report Q4 2025 earnings on Feb 19, 2026, with conference call on Feb 20, 2026 at 10:00 a.m. ET / 9:00 a.m. Mexico City Time.
data.description: In Mexico City, real estate corporation Vesta, S.A.B. de C.V. (NYSE: VTMX, BMV: VESTA) disclosed that their Fourth Quarter 2025 financial outcomes will be made public post-market closure on Thursday, February 19, 2026. Following this, Vesta will conduct a conference call to deliberate on these results. The conference call is scheduled for Friday, February 20, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. ET / 9:00 a.m. Mexico City Time. For participation, individuals can connect through webcast or dial in internationally.

data.title: Correction: LF Networking announces ONE Summit India and Cloud Native Telco Day 2026 to accelerate global AI-native networking.
data.description: Correction: The LF Networking has announced the ONE Summit India and Cloud Native Telco Day 2026 events to advance global AI-Native Networking. These events are set to take place in Bengaluru and Amsterdam, aiming to accelerate the adoption of AI technologies in networking. The summits will bring together industry professionals and experts to discuss the latest trends and innovations in the field. This initiative is expected to have a significant impact on the industry, with an anticipated attendance of over (number) participants.

data.title: ONE Gas announces conference call for Q4 & full year 2025 financial results on Feb. 18, 2026; Schedule for 2026 earnings news releases disclosed.
data.description: ONE Gas, Inc. (NYSE: OGS) has disclosed its schedule for the release of financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. The announcement will be made after the market closes on Wednesday, February 18, 2026. Additionally, the company has also shared the timetable for upcoming earnings news releases, conference calls, and webcasts for the year 2026. This information was made public from Tulsa, Oklahoma on January 22, 2026.

data.title: Parke Bancorp Q4 2025 earnings: Net Income $11.1M, Revenue $38.2M, Total Assets $2.25B, Total Loans $2.04B, all show growth.
data.description: Key Points: In Q4 2025, the net income reached $11.1 million, marking a 4.3% rise from Q3 2025. Revenue for the same quarter amounted to $38.2 million, showing a 2.3% increase from Q3 2025. Total assets saw an uptick to $2.25 billion, reflecting a 5.0% rise from the end of 2024. The total loans also surged to $2.04 billion, indicating an 8.9% increase from December 31, 2024.

data.title: Keurig Dr Pepper (NASDAQ: KDP) to announce Q4 and full year 2025 results on Feb 24, 2026. Market opens Tuesday.
data.description: In Burlington, Massachusetts and Frisco, Texas, Keurig Dr Pepper Inc. (NASDAQ: KDP) is set to announce its financial performance for Q4 and the entire year concluding on December 31, 2025. This data will be unveiled before the market opens on February 24, 2026. Stay tuned for further updates from the Company.

data.title: Trupanion to announce Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings on Feb 12, 2026 after market close.
data.description: Today, Trupanion revealed plans to release its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 after the market concludes trading on February 12, 2026.

data.title: John B. Sanfilippo & Son, Inc. (NASDAQ: JBSS) to discuss Q2 FY2026 results on Jan 30, 2026, following the release on Jan 29.
data.description: Elgin, Illinois--John B. Sanfilippo & Son, Inc. (NASDAQ: JBSS), a leading processor and distributor of snack and recipe nut products as well as a snack bar manufacturer, has scheduled its quarterly conference call to review its second quarter Fiscal 2026 performance. The call will take place on Friday, January 30, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. ET (9:00 a.m. CT), following the release of the Second Quarter Results post-market closure on Thursday, January 29, 2026. data.title: Urban Edge Properties increases total borrowing capacity to $950 million by amending credit facility and receiving $250 million in delayed-draw term loans.
data.description: The latest statistics reveal that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.2%, down from 4.8% last month. The economy added 250,000 jobs in various sectors, with the largest gains seen in the technology and healthcare industries. Additionally, the average hourly wage increased by 3.5% compared to last year. These positive trends indicate a strengthening job market and overall economic growth.

data.title: Stablecoin supply growth slows due to regulation and rising Treasury yields, transitioning from expansion to discipline.
data.description: Compliance expenses for institutions and increased Treasury bond yields are impacting the issuance of stablecoins. This is leading to a transition from fast growth to a focus on maintaining a balanced balance sheet.

data.title: Mercury Insurance provides winter storm preparation tips for Southern homeowners facing ice storms and power outages.
data.description: In Los Angeles on January 22, 2026, Mercury Insurance has highlighted the importance of preparedness as winter weather conditions grow more unpredictable, leading to sudden freezes, ice storms, and power outages in Southern states. Guidance on essential preparedness measures can be found on the Mercury Insurance blog to help individuals navigate these challenges.

data.title: Cohen & Steers announces Q4 and full-year results for 2025, visit Cohen & Steers website for details.
data.description: In New York on January 22, 2026, Cohen & Steers, Inc. (NYSE: CNS) announced their financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2025. They have released their earnings report and presentation for stakeholders to view.

data.title: J.B. Hunt partners with Triumph Network for fast, automated payment solution, boosting carrier efficiency.
data.description: In Dallas, J.B. Hunt recently announced its partnership with the Triumph Network, incorporating Triumph's cutting-edge automated payment system. This move aims to expedite and enhance carrier payment processes. This collaboration signifies a significant step towards optimizing payment cycles within the industry.
